#### OUR SERVICES

### OUR GOAL IS TO GIVE YOU THE HIGHEST QUALITY WORK THAT YOU,   YOUR FAMILY, AND YOUR BUSINESS DESERVE

#### Our team of tree specialists has offered the following services to the community for years!

[![Professional tree removal](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/4b8fa9_33e83379ea3449ce9c231a0522b87ae1~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_864,y_0,w_3456,h_3456/fill/w_221,h_221,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/IMG_2974.jpg)](https://www.patriottreeservicewv.com/tree-trimming)

## [Tree Removal](https://www.patriottreeservicewv.com/tree-removal)

[As soon as a tree begins to become structurally unstable, its removal should occur as soon as possible in order to safeguard both your biggest investment and family's wellbeing.](https://www.patriottreeservicewv.com/tree-removal)

## Patriot Tree Service Provides Complete Tree Solutions From Trimming to Removal And Everything In Between

#### CALL US NOW!

#### [304-207-0115](tel:3042070115)

Request A Free Estimate

#### About Us

## PATRIOT TREE SERVICE IS A FULL SERVICE TREE COMPANY OPERATING IN VIRGINIA, WEST VIRGINIA AND MARYLAND

Patriot Tree Service has earned its distinguished reputation by consistently offering affordable tree care solutions in the Tri-state region of Virginia, West Virginia and Maryland. We pride ourselves on superior craftsmanship and dedicated customer service throughout these times.

From the moment you contact us, until the job is done, our entire focus is on making you 100% satisfied with every step of our tree care services. From trimming and pruning, to removal and stump grinding. Give us a call now on 304-207-0115 for a complimentary quote for any one or more of these tree-care services!

![IMG_3100.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/4b8fa9_bad380c1bd5d42afb1f92d64354d026c~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_954,h_562,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/4b8fa9_bad380c1bd5d42afb1f92d64354d026c~mv2.jpg)

#### FAQ

##### Frequently Asked Questions

We are here to answer all your tree-related questions!

### Why should I hire a professional tree service company?

Hiring a professional tree service company ensures that your trees are properly cared for and maintained. Professional tree services have the expertise, experience, and equipment necessary to safely prune or remove trees without causing damage to your property or nearby structures.

### What types of tree services do you offer?

Our tree service company offers a wide range of services including tree removal, tree trimming, pruning, , stump grinding, property clean-up, power line clearing, and emergency tree services. We also offer free consultations to help you determine the best course of action for your trees.

### How much does tree service cost?

The cost of tree services varies depending on several factors such as the size and type of tree, the complexity of the job, and the location of the tree. We offer competitive pricing and can provide a free estimate for your specific needs.

### What precautions do you take to ensure safety during tree service?

Safety is our top priority during all tree services. We use specialized equipment and techniques to safely access and work on trees. Our team members are trained and experienced in tree service safety procedures and wear proper protective gear. We also take care to prevent damage to your property during the tree service process.

![Bucket Truck Removing Tree for Commercial Facility](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/4b8fa9_19204b7a023f485183f3d4ffd2f6e1c2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_953,h_504,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/4b8fa9_19204b7a023f485183f3d4ffd2f6e1c2~mv2.jpg)

## Commercial Services

Patriot Tree Service's experience working with local municipalities spans several years. We understand the nuances involved with permit and budget restrictions while striving to maximize safety, beauty, and outcomes for each project that falls within these parameters.

​

[Learn More](https://www.patriottreeservicewv.com/commercial-tree-services)

![Bucket Truck Operator Pruning Tree](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/4b8fa9_5092f8e4a06c4f6f9316bed1d2c5e711~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_953,h_504,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/4b8fa9_5092f8e4a06c4f6f9316bed1d2c5e711~mv2.jpg)

## Residential Services

Over our three year of business experience, we provide residential tree care services such as trimming & pruning, removal, hedge care and emergency tree removal! Get in touch with a certified Arborist regarding all of your tree care requirements today.

[Learn More](https://www.patriottreeservicewv.com/residential-tree-services)
